headline: Howmet Aerospace Expands Supply Chain Role With US$1.8b CAM Acquisition
summary: Howmet Aerospace (NYSE:HWM) has completed the acquisition of Consolidated Aerospace Manufacturing, a supplier of aerospace components. The transaction expands Howmet Aerospace's footprint in the aerospace supply chain and broadens its component portfolio. The deal brings additional specialized capabilities and customer relationships under the Howmet Aerospace umbrella. For you as an investor, this deal sits at the intersection of aerospace hardware, materials, and high-specification...

headline: Here's Why Hold Strategy is Apt for Stanley Black Stock Now
summary: SWK shows signs of recovery with aerospace growth and cost savings, but weak tools demand and high debt support a cautious "hold" stance.
